top_signals.title: Gas Demand Set for First Drop Since 2022 on Iran War, IEA Says
top_signals.summary: Global gas demand is poised for the first annual drop since the 2022 energy crisis because of higher prices caused by the Iran war, according to the International Energy Agency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Google backs nuclear fusion startup targeting Europe’s first commercial power plant
top_signals.summary: Proxima Fusion has raised $468 million as it looks to move towards commercializing the promising but infamously difficult technical challenge of nuclear fusion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Badenoch: AI firms ‘won’t come here’ if Britain overregulates
top_signals.summary: Kemi Badenoch has warned Britain risks driving away the next generation of AI giants unless it lowers industrial energy costs or fixes London’s capital markets, arguing the UK cannot regulate its way to becoming a global tech leader. Speaking at the Politics UK Summit in Westminster on Monday evening, the Conservative leader said Britain was [...]

top_signals.title: Standard Nuclear Seeks to Raise $383 Million in US IPO
top_signals.summary: Standard Nuclear Inc., a maker of fuel for nuclear reactors, is seeking to raise as much as $383 million in a US initial public offering.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ADNOC Signs 15-Year LNG Supply Deal With Japan’s Inpex
top_signals.summary: Abu Dhabi’s national oil company ADNOC on Tuesday signed a 15-year long-term deal to supply gas from the UAE’s Ruwais LNG project to Japanese firm Inpex starting from 2028. Under the deal, Inpex, Japan’s largest exploration and production company, will receive 1 million tonnes per annum (mtpa) of liquefied natural gas from the Ruwais LNG project, currently under development in Al Ruwais Industrial City in Abu Dhabi. The agreement “further strengthens the longstanding relationship between INPEX and the ADNOC Group,”…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: U.S. International Trade in Goods and Services, May 2026
top_signals.summary: The U.S. goods and services trade deficit increased in May 2026 according to the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis and the U.S. Census Bureau. The deficit increased from $54.6 billion in April (revised) to $77.6 billion in May, as exports decreased and imports increased. The goods deficit increased $23.6 billion in May to $106.5 billion. The services surplus increased $0.6 billion in May to $28.9 billion. Full Text

top_signals.title: Vietnam arrests suspects behind HiAnime anime piracy service
top_signals.summary: ​Vietnamese authorities have arrested and are prosecuting seven suspects believed to have run HiAnime, the largest anime piracy streaming service before its shutdown in June. [...]
